messages.content: You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
What is a Precious Metals Account?

{"response":"A Precious Metals Account lets you invest in gold and silver through the OCBC app without holding them physically, with no sales charge or custody fees.","in_app":true,"product":"precious metals"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
Can I sell my gold anytime?
{"response":"Yes, you can buy and sell gold and silver 24/7 using the OCBC app.","in_app":true,"product":"precious metals"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
Is there a minimum age requirement?
{"response":"You must be at least 18 years old and have an OCBC deposit account with access to the OCBC app to invest in precious metals.","in_app":true,"product":"precious metals"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
Do I need to buy a full bar of gold?
{"response":"No, you can start from as little as 0.01 ounces of gold or silver, making it accessible even with smaller amounts.","in_app":true,"product":"precious metals"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
How do I begin investing in precious metals?

{"response":"Log in to the OCBC app, go to More > Investments > Precious Metals, open an account instantly, and enter your purchase details to start investing.","in_app":true,"product":"precious metals"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
Are precious metals considered a hedge against inflation?
{"response":"Gold and silver are commonly used to hedge against inflation and are considered safe haven investments during periods of market uncertainty.","in_app":true,"product":"precious metals"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
Can I check my holdings in the app?
{"response":"Yes, after completing your transactions, you can track your precious metals investments directly within the OCBC app.","in_app":true,"product":"precious metals"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
Why do people invest in silver?

{"response":"Silver is a more affordable alternative to gold and has capital appreciation potential due to its industrial uses, including demand from solar energy and electric vehicles.","in_app":true,"product":"precious metals"}
